# ISO 11783-11 DDI source provenance manifest.
#
# Format:
# key|value
#
# This manifest records the public source/version boundary for the generated
# Rust DDI table without vendoring the external database export here. The
# companion test keeps this metadata synchronized with the generated table and
# makes refresh debt explicit instead of silently claiming current official
# parity.
source_url|https://www.isobus.net/isobus/
txt_export_url|https://www.isobus.net/isobus/exports/completeTXT
latest_known_version|2026050501
current_generated_version|2025121001
status|needs_refresh
last_checked|2026-06-17
refresh_gate|Regenerate src/isobus/tc/ddi_database.rs from the source export under the applicable ISO/AEF database terms, update DDI_DATABASE_VERSION and DDI_DATABASE_FINGERPRINT_FNV1A64, review generated diff, rerun make verify
